title: Show Ellipsis
text: Show Ellipsis Determines whether an ellipsis ( … ) is displayed when there is more data than fits in a text field and the field does not have focus. True or False (default). Usage Dynamic? No Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: None Description Note: If a field is defined with the field syntax set to NDI (no display), the Show Ellipsis is turned off. Figure 1. Show Ellipsis in Mobile Application Applies to ucombobox (Combo Box) EditBox Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
